fulltext: Tustin_Integrator shall always satisfy normalv2 => yout = timeStep * 0.5 * ( xin + xinpv ) + ypv
Tustin_Integrator shall always satisfy normalv3 => yout = timeStep * 0.5 * ( xin + xinpv ) + ypv
Tustin_Integrator shall always satisfy yout <= TL &  yout >= BL
Tustin_Integrator shall always satisfy (BL <= IC & IC <= TL & RESET)  => yout = IC
Tustin_Integrator shall always satisfy normal => yout = timeStep * 0.5 * ( xin + xinpv ) + ypv
